body:
airstrike-harpy:

nothing carries quite as much erotic potential as the humble sleepover

I don’t wanna talk about it
I don’t wanna think about it
I’m just feeling low, feeling low
Even when you’re next to me
It’s not the way I’m picturing
I’m just feeling low, feeling low
You wanna be friends forever?
I can think of something better
I’m just feeling low, feeling low
Sleeping here right next to me
But will you ever mess with me? No

But at least I got you in my head, oh yeah….

trail.content_raw: nothing carries quite as much erotic potential as the humble sleepover
